site.project_name: Cubbard Road Marlboro Model B 3D Measurement Engine
site.location: Cubbard Drive / Old Indian Road / Route 9W, Marlborough, NY
site.coordinate_system: WGS84 source points; app uses local ENU feet for schematic geometry

model_b_default.notes: Model B-only parametric seed for schematic measurement and planning-board preparation.

confidence_grades.A: survey / LiDAR / stamped CAD-BIM / controlled metric source
confidence_grades.B: controlled photogrammetry with GCPs or known scale
confidence_grades.C: photo-calibrated schematic geometry or manual dimensions with known references

stormwater_screening.pond_engineering_rule: Any proposed pond, detention basin, retention basin, infiltration basin, or impoundment must be engineered and reviewed.
